creator: adsouza@student.math.uwaterloo.ca
text:
When doing a `make install` on XFree86-4-Clients, I recieved this very
similiar error message:

libc_wrapper.c: In function `xf86open':
libc_wrapper.c:402: `mode_t' is promoted to `int' when passed through `...'
libc_wrapper.c:402: (so you should pass `int' not `mode_t' to `va_arg')
-- 
"Think Random"
www.quikbox.ca
